content:
CALL TRANSCRIPT
Customer: Apex Logistics Co.
Customer ID: C002
Contract ID: K002
Account Executive: James Okafor
Call Type: Adoption Review
Date: June 20, 2023
Participants: James Okafor (AE), Brian Calloway (VP of Operations), Sheila Tran (Operations Manager)

James Okafor: Brian, Sheila — good to connect. We're about five months in. I pulled your usage data before this call and wanted to walk through what I'm seeing.

Brian Calloway: Sure, go ahead.

James Okafor: You've got 9 of 10 users active, which is strong. The audit trail feature is being used heavily — looks like about 40 document version checks per week across the team. That's exactly the use case we talked about.

Sheila Tran: Yeah, the version control has been a game changer. We had a situation two months ago where a shipment manifest was updated incorrectly and we were able to trace it back to the exact change within minutes. That would have taken hours before.

Brian Calloway: It's been solid. My question for you is about the regional offices. We've been talking internally about rolling this out more broadly. What does that look like from a licensing perspective?

James Okafor: The most cost-effective path at that scale would be the Enterprise tier — lower per-user rate and it includes some admin controls you'd want for managing multiple offices. I can put together a proposal this week if you want to model it out.

Brian Calloway: Yes, do that. We're thinking about the January renewal as the natural moment to make the switch.

James Okafor: Perfect, I'll have something to you by end of next week.
